title: Craving cold-brew? De'Longhi's latest automatic espresso machine prepared authentic chilled drinks in just three minutes, complete with chilled milk foam
summary: Unlike some other bean-to-cup coffee makers, which pour a shot of hot espresso over a cup of ice, the Magnifica Duo extracts espresso using cool water directly from the tank and passes it through the freshly-ground coffee beans more slowly to achieve…
